---
title: "type"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# type

```{julia}
typeof(Int64)
```

```{julia}
fieldnames(typeof(Int64(1))) # see the fields in this instance.
```

```{julia}
Int64.name  # see the value of this field.
```

```{julia}
@doc Int64
```

```{julia}
supertype(Signed) # see the upper layer
subtypes(Signed) # see the subtypes
```
